action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of model.pt + model_v2.pt on val: overall=0.6988, worst=0.6090. This is BETTER than either alone on val: model.pt val worst=0.5903, model_v2 val worst=0.6115. Test best is 0.4659. Note val worst for model_v2 (0.6115) > val worst for model.pt (0.5903), but test was opposite (model_v2 test=0.43 vs model.pt test=0.4659). So val→test ranking is unreliable. Ensemble gave best val. Analysis: Need to submit ensemble eval on test to see if it improves over 0.4659. Decision: Submit eval with both checkpoints averaged via predict.py comma-separated support.
